title: No Bedrock Leaks!
description: This resource pack hides bedrock to avoid leaks! It replaces the textures of bedrock with deepslate, so your base stays safe
body:
This resource pack hides bedrock to avoid leaks!!!

Useful for servers like:
DonutSMP
HugoSMP
or other anarchy servers

[IN ALPHA]



Currently supported for 1.21.11

to install resource packs go to 
%appdata$/.minecraft/resourcepacks
If it says "not compatible with sodium" ignore it.
panorama thing will be fixed in 1.0 release
